name: BRAIN / CEREBRAL DEATH
definition: 1st-line test for cerebral perfusion; can be performed at the ICU bed site

demographics.Path: severe brain edema, diffuse liquefactive necrosis

dominant_finding: NO / faint activity in SSS on static image with 99mTc pentetic acid
distribution: activity stops abruptly at the skull base = lack of activity in distribution of anterior and
discriminating_features: activity stops abruptly at the skull base = lack of activity in distribution of anterior and
NO / faint activity in SSS on static image with 99mTc pentetic acid
absence of activity in cerebrum on delayed images with 99mTc bicisate / 99mTc
common carotid arteries must be clearly visualized on 1st pass which confirms a good

activity in face ("hot nose" sign) / scalp must not be mistaken as focal brain activity
